summary: Completed frontend testing of pillar-aware product experience across Care, Dine, and Travel pages. All features verified working correctly - each pillar page uses ProductCard component with correct pillar prop and displays pillar-specific cross-sell titles in product modals.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pillar-aware product experience is fully functional across all pillar pages. ProductCard component correctly receives pillar prop and displays dynamic cross-sell titles based on pillar context.

care_page_product_cards.description: CarePage uses ProductCard component with pillar='care'
care_page_product_cards.evidence: Found 30 product cards on Care page, all using ProductCard component

care_page_cross_sell_title.description: Product modal on CarePage shows 'Complete the Care Package!' cross-sell title
care_page_cross_sell_title.evidence: Screenshot confirms 'Complete the Care Package!' title in modal cross-sell section

dine_page_product_cards.description: DinePage uses ProductCard component with pillar='dine'
dine_page_product_cards.evidence: Found 10 product cards on Dine page, all using ProductCard component

dine_page_cross_sell_title.description: Product modal on DinePage shows 'Complete the Dining Experience!' cross-sell title
dine_page_cross_sell_title.evidence: Screenshot confirms 'Complete the Dining Experience!' title in modal cross-sell section

travel_page_product_cards.description: TravelPage uses ProductCard component with pillar='travel'
travel_page_product_cards.evidence: Found 24 product cards on Travel page, all using ProductCard component

travel_page_cross_sell_title.description: Product modal on TravelPage shows 'Complete the Trip!' cross-sell title
travel_page_cross_sell_title.evidence: Screenshot confirms 'Complete the Trip!' title in modal cross-sell section

ProductCard.jsx.lines_192_208: PILLAR_CROSS_SELL_TITLES correctly defined with all pillar-specific titles
ProductCard.jsx.line_210: ProductCard accepts pillar prop with default 'celebrate'
ProductCard.jsx.line_1154: Cross-sell title dynamically selected using PILLAR_CROSS_SELL_TITLES[pillar]
